title: Mexican Roasted Chicken Bowl
description: A delicious and easy to make Mexican inspired dish, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe serves four and can be customized with your favorite toppings.
instructions: Season the chicken with cumin, chili powder, salt, and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken until browned, then transfer to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes.
While the chicken is roasting, heat some more olive oil in the skillet and sauté the red bell pepper, onion, and tomato until tender.
Fluff the cooked brown rice with a fork and divide among four bowls.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving on top of the rice.
Add the roasted vegetables to the bowls and top with the sliced chicken.
